description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile black casual shoe with a minimalist design, featuring a rounded toe and a slightly upturned front. The upper appears to be made of a smooth synthetic or leather-like material, with subtle stitching along the sides and around the heel. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with thin black laces threaded through small eyelets, and a brown pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The sole is thin and flat, with a slight curve at the arch and a contrasting lighter edge, likely made of rubber for flexibility and grip. The interior is lined with a darker material, possibly fabric or foam, for comfort. Overall, the shoe is designed for everyday urban use, combining style and practicality.
description: A sleek black casual shoe with a minimalist lace-up design, smooth upper, and thin rubber sole. Features a brown heel pull tab and subtle stitching for a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth black upper, subtle stitching, and the brown heel pull tab.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and streamlined silhouette.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same smooth upper and thin sole, with less visibility of the pull tab.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the brown pull tab and the heel structure.
